name: Metal Dish Rack with Powder Coated Finish and Rubber Wood Handles Black - Brightroom™: Freestanding Dish Drying Rack
description:
Breeze through your kitchen routine with this Metal Dish Rack with Rubber Wood Handles from Brightroom™. Featuring a freestanding design, this metal dish drainer features numerous slots for holding dishes and an open space for tumblers or cups. It features an attached plastic utensil holder for drying silverware and other small kitchen tools, while two side rubber wood handles make it easy to lift and carry. Designed in a powder-coated black finish that easily coordinates with different kitchen decor styles, it's sure to bring convenience to your dishwashing duties.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
